name: Blender Gravy
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Liquid (water, milk, or giblet broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the meat to a hot platter, leaving the crusty bits in the pan.
2. Pour the meat juices and fat into a large measuring cup and skim off the fat, reserving 3 tablespoons.
3. Add water, milk, or giblet broth to the meat juices until you have 2 cups of liquid.
4. Transfer the liquid and flour to a blender container and blend until the mixture is smooth.
5. Return the blended gravy to the pan and cook quickly, stirring constantly, until the gravy thickens and becomes bubbly.
6. Scrape the bottom of the pan to incorporate any crusty bits if desired.
7. Season the gravy with salt and pepper to taste.
8. If desired, add a dash of crushed dried thyme leaves and a few drops of Kitchen Bouquet for color.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups.
